Leonard Mitchell.face_description: handsome with the romantic vibe of a poet
Leonard Mitchell.visual_anchor: Early 20s male, black hair, green eyes, untucked white shirt with a black vest draped casually, poetic but unrestrained demeanor
Leonard Mitchell.distinguishing_features: high spiritual perceptivity; magnetic and deep voice; recites poetry in a serene and melancholic manner
Leonard Mitchell.source_notes: Described explicitly as a black-haired, green-eyed Nighthawk.
Leonard Mitchell.era_clothing_lock: untucked white shirt, black vest casually draped on

Dunn Smith.primary_clothing: white shirt, black vest, black trench coat, hat
Dunn Smith.face_description: Deep gaze, occasionally shows a slight hook at the corners of his lips when showing amusement
Dunn Smith.visual_anchor: mid-aged pale male with slightly high hairline and deep gray eyes, always wearing a black top hat and black knee-length Victorian trench coat, carries a tobacco pipe — codename Nighthawk, Church of Evernight dream-walker
Dunn Smith.distinguishing_features: gray eyes described as deep and hidden in shadow; leads the Nighthawks; references Mandated Punishers, Machinery Hivemind, and other Judiciaries as peer organizations
Dunn Smith.faction: Church of Evernight — Nighthawk Beyonder team
Dunn Smith.source_notes: Text explicitly mentions him picking up his halved top hat and his deep gray eyes.
Dunn Smith.era_clothing_lock: black trench coat and halved top hat

Klein Moretti.face_description: average-looking features with a rather deep outline; distinct scholarly air; temples show grotesque wound with burn marks in chapter opening scene
Klein Moretti.visual_anchor: early 20s male, brown eyes that turn deep black during divination, holding a silver-inlaid black cane
Klein Moretti.distinguishing_features: graduated from Khoy University; commoner background; four black dots forming a square appeared briefly on the back of his hand after the ritual
Klein Moretti.faction: citizen of Loen Kingdom, Awwa County, City of Tingen; history graduate of Khoy University
Klein Moretti.source_notes: Clothing and accessories described via reflection in the kidnapper's eyes.
Klein Moretti.era_clothing_lock: black formal suit with a bow tie of the same color

Elliott.hair_style: rather long hair that nearly covered his eyes
Elliott.primary_clothing: miniature gentleman's formal suit—a small shirt, vest, bow tie
Elliott.face_description: obvious freckles on his face, did not seem to stand out
Elliott.visual_anchor: 10-year-old boy with freckles and long hair covering his eyes, wearing a miniature Victorian formal suit
Elliott.accessories: bronze Storm Amulet carved with symbols representing gales and sea waves
Elliott.source_notes: Full name given as Elliott Vickroy, and explicitly referred to as a child.

Klee.primary_clothing: formal clerk attire, trousers soiled at the hem from rain
Klee.face_description: Long and thin face, slightly gaunt features, with a sincere but anxious expression
Klee.visual_anchor: middle-aged man in formal clerk attire, often looking puzzled or worried, carrying a black umbrella
Klee.color_palette: deep black, pale ivory, charcoal grey
Klee.source_notes: Described as a 'lanky man' and 'tall and skinny man', and introduced as the butler of Mr. Vickroy.

Vickroy.primary_clothing: Victorian merchant suit, dark brown wool, white collared shirt
Vickroy.face_description: Standard merchant features, likely showing signs of stress and worry
Vickroy.visual_anchor: Mid-40s male tobacco merchant, fair skin, short dark brown hair, wearing a professional Victorian merchant's waistcoat and suit
Vickroy.source_notes: Referred to as the portly master and tobacco merchant.

Mrs. Orianna.face_description: Refined and elegant face, clear and smiling eyes.
Mrs. Orianna.visual_anchor: 30s female, fair skin, black fashionable curly hair, clear green eyes, wearing a flounce lace dress.
Mrs. Orianna.source_notes: Described directly when Klein meets her in her office.

Welch McGovern.primary_clothing: Expensive Victorian gentleman suit, pale blue waistcoat, white cravat, gold watch chain
Welch McGovern.face_description: Soft features of a wealthy youth, rounded chin, bright curious eyes, friendly expression
Welch McGovern.visual_anchor: early 20s male, fair skin, light brown hair, blue eyes, wearing an expensive pale blue Victorian waistcoat and a gold watch chain
Welch McGovern.distinguishing_features: acquired a notebook from the Fourth Epoch; generous personality; recruited Klein and Naya to help decode it
Welch McGovern.accessories: Gold pocket watch, leather-bound ancient notebook
Welch McGovern.faction: son of a banker from Constant City, Midseashire, Loen Kingdom
Welch McGovern.source_notes: Chapter 9 text: 'He was the son of a banker from Constant City, Midseashire, Loen Kingdom' stated explicitly; his role in obtaining the Fourth Epoch notebook confirmed

The Fool.face_description: features hidden by mysterious gray fog
The Fool.visual_anchor: A mysterious male figure shrouded entirely in gray fog, acting as the initiator of the secret Gathering.
The Fool.distinguishing_features: seated at the Seat of Honor at the head of the bronze table in the gray fog palace; identity is Zhou Mingrui (Klein Moretti's body)
The Fool.source_notes: Described from the picture in the notebook.
